data.title: EU Threatens Additional Taxes On US Tech Giants Amid Ongoing Tariff War: 'We Are Developing Retaliatory Measures', Says Von der Leyen
data.description: The European Union (EU) is contemplating imposing levies on U.S. tech giants like Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) and Google (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) if the ongoing tariff negotiations with the Trump administration fail to be resolved.

data.title: Peter Schiff Expects Mining Firm Newmont Corp To Top $100 Amid Gold Price Rally: 'Wall Street Is Worthless'
data.description: Peter Schiff criticized UBS's recent upgrade of Newmont Corporation, citing room for a higher price target and better outlook.

data.title: Economist Accuses Trump Tariffs Of 'Wrecking The World Economy', Predicts Ways In Which China Will Retaliate
data.description: US economist Jeffrey Sachs warns of potential catastrophe as Trump's tariff policies wreak havoc on global economy.

data.title: Accenture Partners With GoUpscale To Scale Relationship Management In Asia's Digital Wealth Boom
data.description: Accenture invests in GoUpscale through Accenture Ventures to revolutionize digital content & engagement in Asia wealth management. Strategic move to support growth & enhance client experience.

data.title: Why Marriage May Be the Most Important Business Decision You Make
data.description: Every marriage, like every business, begins with optimism. Structuring the financial aspect of your marriage can pay dividends.
